mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_offering
AND (member_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR offering_type LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_offering
AND member_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_budget
AND budget_year = #{year}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_expense
AND (category LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR description LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
